meta.note: Role bands are cross-validated across DOSM (official occupation-group medians) and JobStreet (role-level Malaysian listings), with recruitment-market ranges elsewhere. Roles with basis 'role-level' carry real per-role source figures; basis 'estimate' are indicative anchors (DOSM group + adjacent roles) pending a professional salary guide (e.g. Michael Page/Hays). Regional multipliers (from DOSM state medians) are damped to 60%. Bands floored at minimum wage. Indicative benchmarks, not offers.
meta.freshness_note: Underlying sources publish annually (DOSM survey, Hays/Jobstore guides), so figures are re-verified quarterly rather than monthly. 'Verified' means the published source was re-checked on that date.
